title: Department Manager Vacancy at Godrej Interio - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Godrej Interio - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Interio are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Interio:
Godrej Interio is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Interio!
